OK here is what we need to do
Updated Conkywx config file vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf you can check and use - 
[PHP]

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Wund Weather Config File | Paramvir | rev. 13-10-19 05:10 | ver. 1.0.0
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## THIS PROGRAM IS FOR PERSONAL AND PRIVATE USE ONLY
## CONTACT WUNDERGROUND.COM FOR PROFESSIONAL SOLUTIONS
## CAVEAT: No guarantee that this program will work on all platforms,
## Use At Your Own Risk.

## To comment an option means adding # character at the start of that line
## this line is a comment starting with a # character

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Location settings - REQUIRED
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## # Scottsdale, Arizona, General Vicinity
## Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:85250.1.99999"
## # Indian Harbour Beach, FL
Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:32937.3.99999"
## # Chandler, Arizona, General Vicinity
## Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:85224.1.99999"
## # Fairbanks, Alaska, General Vicinity
## Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:99701.1.99999"
## # Colville, Washington, General Vicinity
## Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:99114.1.99999"

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## xml_ID to use XML data from wunderground - OPTIONAL
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## # Scottsdale, AZ, Equestrian Manor
## xml_ID=KAZSCOTT39
## # Indian Harbour Beach, FL
## xml_id=KFLSATEL4
## # Chandler, AZ, Cooper and Frye
## xml_ID=KAZCHAND36
## # Fairbanks, AK, Skyflight Airstrip
## xml_ID=KAKFAIRB35
## # Colville, WA, Colville Mountain
## # Indian Harbour Beach, FL
xml_ID=KFLINDIA12

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## User position
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Enter Latitude, Longitude and t_zone (time zone) in decimal format
## Comment the position if you want to use wunderground data co-ordinates
## This position will be in 1 decimal place.
## To get more accurate information for your precise location the coordinates
## can be picked by using Google or http://www.findlatitudeandlongitude.com
## Latitude="37.456254° N"
## Longitude="88.867862° E"


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## How to handle the time zone values
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Let conkywx calculate the time difference
## [2] Pick up the time zone values from wunderground
## OR - To Use custom time zone. State the time zone here
t_zone_pick=2

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Time Zone - set t_zone only if t_zone_pick=0
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Comment this variable if not required
## t_zone="7.5"


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Units to use and Downloaded
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Enter the units to get and use, centigrade or Fahrenheit
## [SI] metric
## [IM] imperial/english
Units_to_Use=IM
Units_downloaded=IM


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## comment option to disable, defining variable to 0 also works
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] enable
## if you want to see units like km/h etc in conky
## Units_show=1

## Sunday, 27 will become Sun 27
use_short_date=1

## Every update a popup notification shows
show_notification=1

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Weather Alerts
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Note: Active alerts at present time are only for the US.
## They will NOT warn you if a Tropical Storm is coming your way.
## Enable show_wx_Tropical_alerts for that.
show_wx_Active_alerts=1
show_wx_Tropical_alerts=1

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Allow Conkywx to check for latest version release
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [0] Never check for a new version of Conkywx
## [1] Check for a new version, every 24 hours
enable_new_version_check=1

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Moon font characters with or without outline ring
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## NOTE: Default was formerly "simple" e.g. no outline ring
## [0] Disable outline and use simple
## [1] Use outline and disable simple
moon_outline=1

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Dynamic Moon - using ImageMagick
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## View Moon image as it appears outside
## [1] use your local time, [2] use station local time for calculation
## Needs Imagemagick installed
Dynamic_Moon=2

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Font to Image - using ImageMagick
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## convert ConkyWeather font to 3D images - state the colour here.
## Use only for Image Templates
## COMMENT these options for using in font templates
## COMMENT these options for using regular weather images in image templates
## Needs Imagemagick installed
## to see List of Color Names visit http://www.imagemagick.org/script/color.php
## Colour can be stated in any of the following formats - enclosed in single quotes
## example for colour *lime* - 'lime' '#0f0' '#00ff00' 'rgb(0,255,0)' 'rgb(0,100%,0)'
fti_now='#fed577'
fti_wind='DarkSeaGreen1'
fti_fct='lime'

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Trend Graphs - using GnuPlot
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## We have ability to generate graphs for temperature, pressure and dewpoint
## You need gnuplot to be installed
## comment these colour options do disable
## colour can be in names or '#fed577' format if name gives white output
## This seed data is generated by wunderground and rest is recorded by conkywx
graph_temp='red'
graph_pressure='green'
graph_dewpoint='cyan'


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  How do you want the present conditon to look like
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Capitalize The First Letter Of All Words, In The Present Condition [Default]
## [2] All UPPERCASE
## [3] all lowercase
## [4] Capitilize the first letter/first word only, in the present condition
pc_what_case=1


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Add words you want to remove from Present Condition text in this list
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Comment this variable Block if not required
pcondition_blacklist=(
    Freezing
    pellet
    pellets
    Precipitation
    Small
    'and:+'
    'heavy:hvy'
    'light:lt'
    'Low Drifting'
    'Patches of'
    'Severe:svr'
    'Thunderstorms:t-storms'
    'Thunderstorm:t-storms'
    'Widespread:ws'
    'with:+'
)

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Process the final template before showtime
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Comment this variable Block if not required
template_cleanup=(
    'AM:${offset -2}AM'
    'PM:${offset -2}PM'
    'N/A:${offset 2}N/A'
    '${goto 206}100%:${goto 201}100%'
    'Calm km/h:${offset 8}Calm'
    'Calm mph:${offset 8}Calm'
    'First Quarter:${offset -6}First Qtr'
    'Full${font}:${offset -11}Full Moon${font}'
    'New Moon:${offset -13}New Moon'
    'Last Quarter:${offset -5}Last Qtr'
    'Waning Crescent:${offset -3}Waning'
    'Waning Gibbous:${offset -3}Waning'
    'Waxing Crescent:${offset -3}Waxing'
    'Waxing Gibbous:${offset -3}Waxing'
)

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  LANGUAGE to see data in
##  Current Supported Languages:
#    it [Italian]    - Message & Language Translation by "Night Train"
#    es [Spanish]    - Language Translation by "Paramvir" needs proofing
#    pt [Portuguese]    - Language Translation by "Paramvir" needs proofing
#    de [German]        - Language Translation by "Paramvir" needs proofing
#    fr [French]        - Language Translation by "Paramvir" needs proofing
#    English is default and needs no setting
## Comment this variable if not required
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## language_to_use="it"

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Use UPPERCASE or lowercase AM PM or am pm for 12 hour time format
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] ALL UPPERCASE (EXAMPLE: 03:00 PM)
## [2] all lowercase (example: 03:00 pm)
## [3] Hide am pm (example: 03:00)
## [4] all lowercase with no padding/spacing (example: 3:00pm)
## [5] Use 24 hour time format
## OR - To Use custom time format. State the format here
## To get more date formats see man strftime
## Time_format='%-I:%M %p'
Time_format='%l:%M %p'

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Show time with month and day for Moon Phases
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Show month day time (example: May 18 10:06 am)
##      The time will follow the Time_format settings above in Time_format.
## [2] Show only month n day (EXAMPLE: May 18)
## OR - To Use custom time format. State the format here
## To get more date formats see man strftime
## moon_time='%d %b %R'
moon_time=1

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Today date format - used in last fetch
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
today_date_format='%A %b, %d %Y'

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## show deg symbol in forecast temps,
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Hide all deg symbols (example: 95/63)
## [2] Show all deg symbols (example: 95°/63°)
## [3] Show all deg symbols, depending on Unit_to_Use (metric: 35°C/17°C) (imperial: 95°F/63°F)
## [4] Show deg symbol ONLY, after forecast pair (example: 95/63°)
## [5] Show deg symbol AND unit, after forecast pair (example: 95/63°F) [Default]
show_degsym_fc_temp=4

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## characters to use for forecast trends
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Rising trend arrow
risingtrend='c'
##
## Falling trend arrow
fallingtrend='d'
##
## Steady trend arrow
steadytrend='Q'


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Choose weather icon set
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Enable icon set: org 12 by bharathp666 (Paramvir Likhari remix)
## [2] Enable icon set: origin unknown
## [3] Enable icon set: tick weather icons by xiao4
## [4] Enable icon set: Sticker Weather Icons by Kortoik
wx_iconset=2

## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Minimum time the script allows the website to be polled
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
minimum_fetch_time=870

## Uncomment for testing purposes. Fetches fresh data every time Conky is restarted.
## minimum_fetch_time=10
## minimum_fetch_time=3600

## Font to image internal settings - do not comment - change only if required
## These setting changes may be required for some Systems
## ONLY USED if you are using fti [ font to image] above - do not comment these
## you can change these values if rendered images are not to your liking
## 3d_depth = normalize level % - 0-max depth, 50-flat, 50 - 100 inverse 3D, only whole values no decimal
## line_thickness = strokewidth value can use decimal values
## image_thickness = blur sigma value can use decimal values
## brightness = tint % only whole values no decimal
## if your images are looking rather bright or white then perhaps you can use the below commented values

fti_now_3d_depth='5%'
fti_now_line_thickness='2'
fti_now_image_thickness='6'
fti_now_brightness='110%'

fti_fct_3d_depth='20%'
fti_fct_line_thickness='2'
fti_fct_image_thickness='6'
fti_fct_brightness='115%'

fti_wind_3d_depth='15%'
fti_wind_line_thickness='1'
fti_wind_image_thickness='2'
fti_wind_brightness='115%'

## For Ubuntu 13+ and Mint Systems

## fti_now_3d_depth='8%'
## fti_now_line_thickness='3'
## fti_now_image_thickness='2'
## fti_now_brightness='70%'

## fti_fct_3d_depth='15%'
## fti_fct_line_thickness='3'
## fti_fct_image_thickness='2'
## fti_fct_brightness='100%'

## fti_wind_3d_depth='5%'
## fti_wind_line_thickness='1'
## fti_wind_image_thickness='1'
## fti_wind_brightness='110%'
[/PHP]

Updated wx-wu-vindsl-imperial-weather-graphic-template.sh
NOTE: you will  need to check the alignment of the content.

[PHP]#################################################
## VinDSL/ Paramvir | rev. 13-10-19 05:15 | ver. GRAPHIC ##
#################################################
## IMPERIAL WEATHER TEMPLATE for Conkywx 1.0.0 ##
#################################################
# ${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWX${color0}${if_empty ${exec echo [WALERT]}}${else}${offset 8}Alert:${offset 8}${color4}[WALERT]${endif}${color6}${offset 8}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset 9}${font Arrows:size=28}${goto 160}${color6}[FCTTF]${font}
${voffset -43}${font RadioSpace:size=33}${color6}${alignc 13}[PT]${font}
${voffset 2}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.4}${alignc 6}${color5}Feels${offset 3}like${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[FL]${offset 2}${color5}/${offset 3}${color6}[FCTT]${font}
${voffset -40}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.75}${color6}[D1T]${font}
${voffset 0}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.3}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color6}[D1P]${font}
${voffset -45}${goto 188}${font KRARound:size=41.5}${color6}I${font}
${voffset 6}${font Ubuntu:size=22.75}${color5}${alignc}[CT]${font}
${voffset 7}${alignc 3}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color5}Sunrise${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[SR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTSRF]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 10}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color5}Sunset${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[SS]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTSSF]${font}
${voffset 8}${goto 85}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Humidity${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[HM]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTHF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 84}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Barometer${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[BR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTPF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 84}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Moonrise${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[MR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTMRF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 84}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Moonset${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[MS]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTMSF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 85}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Full${offset 3}Moon${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[FM]${font}
# This is wind rose Font to Image - Automatically falls back to font if image fails
# ${if_existing [BI]}${voffset 45}${image [BI] -p 0, 195 -s 95x95}${else}${voffset -65}${goto 10}${font ConkyWindNESW:size=60}${color1}[BF]${font}${endif}
# The line below has the wind rose and the moon phase - you will need to comment this line below and use the moon image as below in comment
${voffset -65}${goto 16}${font ConkyWindNESW:size=41.6}${color6}[BF]${font}${voffset -34}${goto 196}${font MoonPhases:size=35}${color6}[MIF]${font}
${voffset -36}${font DroidSans:bold:size=11}${color 777}${alignc -92}[MV]${font}
${voffset 18}${goto 22}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color3}[WS] mph${voffset 0}${goto 203}[MP]${font}
${voffset 9}${goto 27}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.5}${color5}[D2D]${goto 86}[D3D]${goto 145}[D4D]${goto 201}[D5D]${font}
${image [PIC] -p 12,674 -s 48x48}${image [D2I] -p 22,873 -s 34x34}${image [D3I] -p 82,873 -s 34x34}${image [D4I] -p 141,873 -s 34x34}${image [D5I] -p 198,873 -s 34x34}
${voffset 33}${goto 27}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.5}${color3}[D2T]${goto 87}[D3T]${goto 147}[D4T]${goto 203}[D5T]${font}
${voffset -1}${goto 24}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}[D2P]${goto 84}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}[D3P]${goto 144}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}[D4P]${goto 201}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}[D5P]${font}
# The moon image
# ${image [MIC] -p 9, 305 -s 85x85}
# These are for Trend Graphs - take out the comment and place the image as required use the -p x,y axis option
# ${image [GT] -p 202, 168 -s  50x10}
# ${image [GP] -p 320, 255 -s  50x10}
# ${image [GD] -p 320, 220 -s  50x10}

[/PHP]


To get the alerts working use something like this:
This template7 is the variable that holds the path to file wxalert which is in the conkywx temp directory.
```

template7 /tmp/name of conkywx tmp directory/wxalert

TEXT
${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWXl${if_existing ${template7}} \
${color8}Alert: ${if_match ${execi 60 expr length "$(cat ${template7})"}>=32}\
${color5}${scroll 30 10 ${execi 60 cat ${template7}}}${else}\
${color5}${execi 60 cat ${template7}}${endif}${endif} ${color4}${hr 2}${font}${color8}

```


Let me know how it goes :lol:

Basically it is unified code where the desire is to have minimal user interaction and the stuff should just work.

Having said that - we also want to do that tweak which makes our eyes and hearts happy.

You can remove the lines you are not using template2,3,5 and 6 and also remove the comments in conky weather - even if you leave them there it does not make any difference.

> 
Right now in the tmp directory there is a folder named **/tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39**
Does that folder name ever change and do I just put template7 in that folder and then add this to the above file?

template7 "/tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/wxalert"


The conkywx folder is based on **"wx-**UserName-ConfigFileName**-pChA_r_27u0-m39**" The bold part never changes :)
in your case = /tmp/wx-**_cavsfan_-_vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf_**-pChA_r_27u0-m39
so the entry will look like what you wrote above:
template7 "/tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/wxalert"

> 
Only template0, template1, and template4 are currently used:
```
##################################
##      CONKYWX WEATHER         ##
##################################
${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWX${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
####
## Uncomment for IMPERIAL Weather Stats (DINGBAT font set).
#${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template1}" -t "${template3}"}${font}
####

####

####
## Uncomment for Metric Weather Stats (GRAPHIC icon set).
# ${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template2}" -t "${template6}"}${font}
```

ha ha ha your brain is very resilient amigo lol - no worries on that front ;)

template7 is being called in the blue bold highlighting above...

That information goes in the TEXT section of **.conkyrc.vindsl **- the wxalert file is where the alerts are stored for conky **scroll** command to read**.** You will probably need to adjust the color commands in the bold section below.```
##################################
##      CONKYWX WEATHER         ##
##################################
# ${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWX${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
[B]${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWX${if_existing ${[COLOR=#0000ff]template7[/COLOR]}} \
${color8}Alert: ${if_match ${execi 60 expr length "$(cat ${[COLOR=#0000ff]template7[/COLOR]})"}>=32}\
${color5}${scroll 30 10 ${execi 60 cat ${[COLOR=#0000ff]template7[/COLOR]}}}${else}\
${color5}${execi 60 cat ${[COLOR=#0000ff]template7[/COLOR]}}${endif}${endif} ${color4}${hr 2}${font}${color8}[/B]
####
## Uncomment for IMPERIAL Weather Stats (DINGBAT font set).
#${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template1}" -t "${template3}"}${font}
####
## Uncomment for IMPERIAL Weather Stats (GRAPHIC icon set).
${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template1}" -t "${template4}"}${font}
####
## Uncomment for METRIC Weather Stats (DINGBAT font set).
# ${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template2}" -t "${template5}"}${font}
####
## Uncomment for Metric Weather Stats (GRAPHIC icon set).
# ${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template2}" -t "${template6}"}${font}

```

Have you got the trend graphs showing???

This should work now...

###############################################
## VinDSL | rev. 12-11-19 11:55 | ver. 0.7.9 ##
###############################################
##          November 2012 Series             ##
###############################################

## ¡PLEASE READ THE FINE PRINT! ##

####
## Development Platforms (current)
#
#  Ubuntu 10.10 'Maverick Meerkat' (GNOME 2.28 - Conky 1.8.0-1)
#  Ubuntu 13.04 'Raring Ringtail'  (GNOME-SHELL - UNITY - LXDE - Conky 1.9.0-2)
#  Screen Resolution: 1920x1200x24 (DELL UltraSharp 1907FP)
#
## Tips n' Tricks: conky 1.8.1 will no longer be supported. RIP :)

####
## Prerequisites (required)
#
#  conky-all 1.8.0-1 or 1.9.0-2
#  Conkywx 0.9.3 (Paramvir Likhari)
#  UTF-8 Compatible Text Editor

####
## Installed fonts (required)
#
#  Arrows (JLH Fonts - not included in link below)
#  ConkyWeather (Stanko Metodiev)
#  Cut Outs for 3D FX (Fonts & Things)
#  Droid Font Family (Google Android SDK)
#  KR A Round (Kat's Fun Fonts)
#  Moon Phases (Curtis Clark)
#  OpenLogos (Icoma)
#  PizzaDude Bullets (Jakob Fischer)
#  Radio Space (Iconian Fonts)
#  StyleBats (Vinterstille)
#  Ubuntu Font Family (Canonical Ltd)
#  Ubuntu Title Bold (Paulo Silva - not included in link below)
#  Weather (Jonathan Macagba)
# 
## Tips n' Tricks from: Mr. Peachy, djyoung4, and 42dorian (Thanks!)
## Most necessary fonts can be downloaded here: http://ompldr.org/vOHdoag
## Unzip the fonts into your font folder, for example: /home/username/.fonts
## Run this command in a terminal (rebuilds font cache file): sudo fc-cache -fv

####
## Use XFT? Required to Force UTF8 (see below)
#
use_xft yes
xftfont DroidSans:size=8.75
xftalpha 0.1

####
## Force UTF8? Requires XFT (see above)
## Displays degree symbol, instead of Â°, etc.
#
override_utf8_locale yes

####
## This buffer is used for single lines, text, output from $exec, and other variables.
## Increasing the 'text_buffer_size' (too high) will drastically reduce Conky's performance.
## Decreasing the buffer size (too low) will truncate content and cause strange display output.
## Standard text buffer size is 256 bytes (cannot be less). Adjust YOUR buffer wisely!
## Tips n' Tricks from dk75:"You don't need to create a 12KiB buffer for every Conky config line."
#
text_buffer_size 4352

####
## Maximum number of special things, e.g. fonts, offsets, aligns, etc. (default is 512)
## Tips n' Tricks from: sparker256 (Thanks, Bill!)
#
max_specials 700

####
## Daemonize Conky, aka 'fork to background'.
#
background yes

####
## Update interval in seconds.
#
update_interval 2.0

####
## The number of times Conky will update before quitting.
## Zero makes Conky run forever.
#
total_run_times 0

####
## Create 'own_window' type. Makes Conky behave like other panels.
#
own_window yes
own_window_transparent yes
own_window_type normal
own_window_hints undecorated,below,sticky,skip_taskbar,skip_pager
####
## Some distros require the following lines for true transparency.
## BOTH of these lines need to be Commented/Uncommented in tandem.
#
own_window_argb_visual yes
own_window_argb_value 255

####
## Force images to redraw when they change.
#
imlib_cache_size 1

####
## Use double buffering? Reduces flicker.
#
double_buffer yes

####
## Draw shades?
#
draw_shades yes
default_shade_color 330

####
## Draw outlines?
#
draw_outline no

####
## Draw borders around text?
#
draw_borders no

####
## Draw borders around graphs?
#
draw_graph_borders no

####
## Print text to stdout?
## Print text in console?
#
out_to_ncurses no
out_to_console no

####
## Text alignment.
#
alignment top_right

####
## Minimum size of the text area.
## Syntax: minimum_size [width] [height]
#
#minimum_size 245 1394
minimum_size 245 1894
maximum_width 1200 
####added by me
## Maximum size of user text buffer, i.e. layout below TEXT line in config file (default is 16384 bytes)
max_user_text 81920

####
## Maximum width of the text area.
## Syntax: maximum_width [width]
#
maximum_width 245

####
## Gap between text and screen borders.
#
gap_x 6      # Left/Right
gap_y 32  # Top/Bottom

####
## Shorten MiB/GiB to M/G in stats.
#
short_units yes

####
## Pad % symbol spacing after numbers.
#
pad_percents 0

####
## Pad spacing between text and borders.
#
border_inner_margin 4

####
## Limit the length of names in "Top Processes".
#
top_name_width 10

####
## Subtract file system -/+buffers/cache from used memory?
## Set to yes, to produce meaningful physical memory stats.
#
no_buffers yes

####
## Set to yes, if you want all text to be in UPPERCASE.
#
uppercase no

####
## Number of cpu samples to average.
## Set to 1 to disable averaging.
#
cpu_avg_samples 2

####
## Number of net samples to average.
## Set to 1 to disable averaging.
#
net_avg_samples 2

####
## Add spaces to keep things from moving around?
## Only affects certain objects.
#
use_spacer right

####
## My colors (suit yourself)
#
color0 White        #FFFFFF
color1 Ivory        #FFFFF0
color2 Ivory2        #EEEEE0
color3 Ivory3        #CDCDC1
color4 Tan1        #FFA54F
color5 Tan2        #EE9A49
color6 Gray        #7E7E7E
color7 AntiqueWhite4    #8B8378
color8 DimGray        #696969
color9 Tomato        #FF6347
# colorX OrangeRed    #FF4500

#####
## Load Lua for shading (optional)
## Set the path to your script here.
#
lua_load ~/.conky/draw_bg.lua
lua_draw_hook_pre draw_bg

####
## Load Lua for bargraphs (required)
## Set the path to your script here.
#
# lua_load ~/.conky/bargraph_small.lua
lua_load ~/.conky/bargraph_testing.lua
lua_draw_hook_post main_bars

####
## Define the locations of Conkywx files (required)
## Set the path to your .confs and templates here.
#
template0 "/usr/share/conkywx/conkywx.sh"
template1 "/home/cavsfan/.config/conkywx/vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf"
template4 "/home/cavsfan/.config/conkywx/wx-wu-vindsl-imperial-weather-graphic-template.sh"
template7 "/tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/wxalert"

TEXT
##################################
##             LOGO             ##
##################################
## Uncomment for hard-coded ID (static)
# ${voffset -33}${font OpenLogos:size=103}${color2}v${font}${voffset -75}${goto 179}${font UbuntuTitleBold:size=19.6}${color4}1${offset 1}2${offset 1}.${offset 0}0${offset 0}4${font}
####
## Uncomment for soft-coded ID (dynamic)
${voffset -30}${font OpenLogos:size=93}${color2}v${font}${voffset -75}${goto 179}${font UbuntuTitleBold:size=12.6}${color4}${pre_exec cat /etc/*release | grep 'RELEASE' | awk -F'=' '{print $2}'}${font}
####
## Additional ID (branch version, code name, release date, etc.)
${voffset -2}${goto 181}${font Ubuntu-B:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Conky ${conky_version}${font}
# ${voffset 0}${goto 181}${font Ubuntu-B:size=8}${color4}Pre-Alpha${font}
####
## Uncomment to display YOUR custom graphic image (upper-right corner)
#${voffset -30}${font OpenLogos:size=103}${color2}v${font}${voffset -52}${image /home/cavsfan/Pictures/ABC.jpg -p 180,0 -s 52x52 -n}
##################################
##            SYSTEM            ##
##################################
${voffset 7}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}SYSTEM${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset 4}${font OpenLogos:size=10}${color2}u${voffset -4}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}${pre_exec lsb_release -sd | sed -e 's/development/dev/g'}${alignr}${pre_exec lsb_release -sr}${font}
${voffset 2}${offset -2}${font OpenLogos:size=12}${color2}Z${voffset -4}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 3}${sysname}${offset 3}${kernel}${alignr}${font DroidSans:size=8.3}${machine}${font}
####
## Uncomment for nVidia ID (nvidia-smi version - dynamic)
${voffset 2}${font StyleBats:size=10}${color2}d${voffset -2}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}${pre_exec nvidia-smi -q | grep "Product Name" | sed -e 's/.*: /nVidia /'}${alignr}${pre_exec nvidia-smi -q | grep "Driver Version" | awk '{print $4}'}${font}
####
## Uncomment for 'nvidia-current' driver ID (DPKG version - hybrid)
# ${voffset 2}${font StyleBats:size=10}${color2}d${voffset -2}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}nVidia GeForce 7600 GT${alignr}${font DroidSans:size=8.3}${pre_exec dpkg --status nvidia-current | grep Version | cut -f 1 -d '-' | sed 's/[^.,0-9]//g'}${font}
####
## Uncomment for nvidia driver ID (OpenGL version - hydrid)
# ${voffset 2}${font StyleBats:size=10}${color2}d${voffset -2}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}nVidia GeForce 7600 GT${alignr}${font DroidSans:size=8.3}${pre_exec glxinfo | grep 'OpenGL version string' | sed -e 's/OpenGL.*: //' | cut -c '14-19'}${font}
####
## Uncomment for hard-coded video ID (any card / any driver - static)
# ${voffset 2}${font StyleBats:size=10}${color2}d${voffset -2}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}Video Card Product Name${alignr}Driver Version${font DroidSans:size=8.3}${font}
####
## Uncomment for CPU ID / CPU frequency (hybrid)
#${voffset 2}${font StyleBats:size=10}${color2}A${voffset -1}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}Intel${offset 3}Core${offset 3}2${offset 3}Quad Q9550${alignr 1}${font DroidSans:size=8.3}${freq_g cpu0}${offset 1}GHz${font}
${voffset 2}${font StyleBats:size=10}${color2}A${voffset -1}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}Intel${offset 3}Core${offset 3}2${offset 3}Quad Q9550${alignr 1}${font DroidSans:size=8.3}2.83${offset 1}GHz${font}
####
## Uncomment for System Uptime (hybrid)
${voffset 2}${font StyleBats:size=10}${color2}q${voffset -1}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}System${offset 3}Uptime${alignr}${font DroidSans:size=8.3}${uptime_short}${font}
## uncoment for grub version
${voffset 2}${font OpenLogos:size=10}${color2}u${voffset -1}${font DroidSans:size=8.6}${color0}${offset 5}Grub${offset 3}Version${alignr}${font DroidSans:size=8.3}${pre_exec grub-install -v | grep grub-install | cut -c21-42}${font}

${voffset 16}${font StyleBats:size=9.9}${color2}x${voffset -2}${font DroidSansFallback:size=8.3}${color0}${offset 4}FANTOM USB${goto 95}${font DroidSans:size=8.3}${fs_used /media/Fantom}${goto 133}/${offset 5}${fs_size /media/Fantom}${alignr}${fs_free_perc /media/Fantom}%${font}

${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}NETWORK${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}

${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWX${if_existing ${template7}} \
${color8}Alert: ${if_match ${execi 60 expr length "$(cat ${template7})"}>=32}\
${color5}${scroll 30 10 ${execi 60 cat ${template7}}}${else}\
${color5}${execi 60 cat ${template7}}${endif}${endif} ${color6}${hr 2}${font}${color8}
####
## Uncomment for IMPERIAL Weather Stats (GRAPHIC icon set).
${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template1}" -t "${template4}"}${font}
##################################
##           TIME               ##
##################################
${voffset 5}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}TIME${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset -10}${font RadioSpace:size=32}${color0}${if_match ${time %l}<=9}${alignc 7}${time %l:%M}${offset 3}${time %p}${else}${if_match ${time %l}>=10}${alignc -1}${time %l:%M}${offset 3}${time %p}${endif}${endif}${font}
##################################
##         CALENDAR             ##
##################################
${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}DATE${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset 18}${font DroidSansMono:size=7.55}${color2}${alignc 60}${time %A}${font}
${voffset -4}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=18}${if_match ${time %e}<=9}${color0}${alignc 65}${time %e}${font}${else}${if_match ${time %e}>=10}${color0}${alignc 60}${time %e}${endif}${endif}${font}
${voffset 0}${font DroidSansMono:size=7.55}${color2}${alignc 60}${time %B}${font}
${voffset 0}${font DroidSansMono:size=7.6}${color2}${alignc 60}${time %Y}${font}
${voffset -80}${font CutOutsFor3DFX:size=67}${color7}${alignc 99}2${font}
####
## Uncomment for "SUNDAY = First Day-of-the-Week" (use mono fonts only)
${voffset -70}${font DroidSansMono:size=7.55}${color0}${execpi 60 VinDSL_Cal_9=`date +%-d`; cal -h | sed -e 's/\r//g' -e 's/^/ /g' -e '1d' -e s/^/"\$\{offset 100"\}/ -e 's/\<'"$VinDSL_Cal_9"'\>/${color4}&${color0}/'}
####
## Uncomment for "MONDAY = First Day-of-the-Week" (use mono fonts only)
# ${voffset -68}${font DroidSansMono:size=7.55}${color0}${execpi 60 VinDSL_Cal_9=`date +%-d`; ncal -M -C -h | sed -e 's/\r//g' -e 's/^/ /g' -e '1d' -e s/^/"\$\{offset 100"\}/ -e 's/\<'"$VinDSL_Cal_9"'\>/${color4}&${color0}/'}
##################################
##  RHYTHMBOX 1 (Experimental)  ##
##################################
#${if_running rhythmbox}
#${voffset -13}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}RHYTHMBOX${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
#${voffset 2}${font DroidSans:size=8.25}${color3}${if_match "${execpi 2 expr length "`/usr/bin/rhythmbox-client --print-playing-format %tt | head -n 1`"}" >= "48"}${alignr 15}${scroll 38 4* ${execi 2 rhythmbox-client --print-playing-format %tt --no-start}}${font}${else}${alignc}${execi 2 rhythmbox-client --print-playing-format %tt --no-start}${font}${endif}${endif}
##################################
##  RHYTHMBOX 2 (Experimental)  ##
##################################
${if_running rhythmbox}
${voffset -13}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}RHYTHMBOX${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset 5}${font DroidSans:size=8.25}${color3}${if_match "${execpi 2 expr length "`qdbus org.mpris.MediaPlayer2.rhythmbox /\org/mpris/MediaPlayer2 org.mpris.MediaPlayer2.Player.Metadata | grep title | cut -c 14-""`"}" >= "48"}${alignr 15}${scroll 38 4* ${execi 2 qdbus org.mpris.MediaPlayer2.rhythmbox /\org/mpris/MediaPlayer2 org.mpris.MediaPlayer2.Player.Metadata | grep title | cut -c 14-""}}${font}${else}${alignc}${execi 2 qdbus org.mpris.MediaPlayer2.rhythmbox /\org/mpris/MediaPlayer2 org.mpris.MediaPlayer2.Player.Metadata | grep title | cut -c 14-""}${font}${endif}${endif}
##################################
##    BANSHEE (Experimental)    ##
##################################
${if_running banshee}
${voffset -26}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}BANSHEE${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset 3}${font DroidSans:size=8.25}${color0}${if_match "${execpi 2 expr length "`/usr/bin/banshee --query-title --no-present | cut -f1- -d " "`"}" >= "48"}${alignr 15}${scroll 38 4* ${execi 2 banshee --query-title --no-present | cut -f2- -d " "}}${font}${else}${alignc}${execi 2 banshee --query-title --no-present | cut -f2- -d " "}${font}${endif}${endif}
##################################
##   GUAYADEQUE (Experimental)  ##
##################################
${if_running guayadeque}
${voffset -36}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}GUAYADEQUE${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:size=8.25}${color0}${if_match "${execpi 2 expr length "`qdbus org.mpris.guayadeque /\Player org.freedesktop.MediaPlayer.GetMetadata | grep title | cut -f2- -d" "`"}" >= "48"}${alignr 15}${scroll 38 4* ${execi 2 qdbus org.mpris.guayadeque /\Player org.freedesktop.MediaPlayer.GetMetadata | grep title | cut -f2- -d" "}}${font}${else}${alignc}${execi 2 qdbus org.mpris.guayadeque /\Player org.freedesktop.MediaPlayer.GetMetadata | grep title | cut -f2- -d" "}${font}${endif}${endif}
##################################
##     VLC (Experimental)       ##
##################################
${if_running vlc}
${voffset -47}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}VLC${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset 3}${font DroidSans:size=8.25}${color3}${if_match "${execpi 2 expr length "`/usr/bin/xlsclients -l | grep "VLC media player" | cut -c -9 --complement | rev | cut -c 19- | rev`"}" >= "48"}${alignr 15}${scroll 38 4* ${execi 2 xlsclients -l | grep "VLC media player" | cut -c -9 --complement | rev | cut -c 19- | rev}}${font}${else}${alignc}${execi 2 xlsclients -l | grep "VLC media player" | cut -c -9 --complement | rev | cut -c 19- | rev}${font}${endif}${endif}
##################################
##     Audaciuos                ##
##################################
${if_running audacious}
${voffset -70}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}Audacious${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 2}$font$
${voffset -3}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color6}${audacious_title 250}
${color4}${audacious_bar 10,250 }${color6}
${audacious_position}/${audacious_length}  Sample Rate${alignc} ${audacious_frequency} Hz ${alignr}${audacious_status}${endif}
```

${voffset -43}${font RadioSpace:size=33}${color6}${alignc 13}83°${font}
${voffset 2}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.4}${alignc 6}${color5}Feels${offset 3}like${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}92°${offset 2}${color5}/${offset 3}${color6}Falling${font}
${voffset -40}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.75}${color6}93/77°${font}
${voffset 0}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.3}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color6}30%${font}
${voffset -45}${goto 188}${font KRARound:size=41.5}${color6}I${font}
${voffset 6}${font Ubuntu:size=22.75}${color5}${alignc}!5 Partly Cloudy${font}
${voffset 7}${alignc 3}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color5}Sunrise${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}7:26 ${Offset -2}Am ${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}c${font}${voffset -2}${offset 10}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color5}Sunset${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}6:47 ${Offset -2}Pm ${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}d${font}
${voffset 8}${goto 85}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Humidity${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}79%${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}c${font}${voffset 11}${goto 84}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Barometer${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}29.95${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}d${font}${voffset 11}${goto 84}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Moonrise${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}8:05 ${Offset -2}Pm ${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}c${font}${voffset 11}${goto 84}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Moonset${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}8:54 ${Offset -2}Am ${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}c${font}${voffset 11}${goto 85}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Full${offset 3}Moon${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}Nov 17 11:16 ${Offset -2}Am ${font}
# This is wind rose Font to Image - Automatically falls back to font if image fails
# ${if_existing [BI]}${voffset 45}${image [BI] -p 0, 195 -s 95x95}${else}${voffset -65}${goto 10}${font ConkyWindNESW:size=60}${color1}[BF]${font}${endif}
# The line below has the wind rose and the moon phase - you will need to comment this line below and use the moon image as below in comment
${voffset -65}${goto 16}${font ConkyWindNESW:size=41.6}${color6}J${font}${voffset -34}${goto 196}${font MoonPhases:size=35}${color6}A${font}
${voffset -36}${font DroidSans:bold:size=11}${color 777}${alignc -92}97%${font}
${voffset 18}${goto 22}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color3}3.0  mph${voffset 0}${goto 203}${Offset -3}Waning ${font}
${voffset 9}${goto 27}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.5}${color5}Mon 21${goto 86}Tue 22${goto 145}Wed 23${goto 201}Thu 24${font}
${image /tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/nowCond.png -p 12,674 -s 48x48}${image /tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/dailyimg_2.png -p 22,873 -s 34x34}${image /tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/dailyimg_3.png -p 82,873 -s 34x34}${image /tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/dailyimg_4.png -p 141,873 -s 34x34}${image /tmp/wx-cavsfan-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/dailyimg_5.png -p 198,873 -s 34x34}
${voffset 33}${goto 27}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.5}${color3}93/77°${goto 87}91/75°${goto 147}86/72°${goto 203}82/72°${font}
${voffset -1}${goto 24}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}30%${goto 84}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}30%${goto 144}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}40%${goto 201}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}0%${font}
# The moon image
# ${image [MIC] -p 9, 305 -s 85x85}
# These are for Trend Graphs - take out the comment and place the image as required use the -p x,y axis option

### Post by Cavsfan on 2013-10-20
I think I have fixed that error that was appearing in the **wxalert** file in the tmp directory.
I commented out the xml_ID= line in **/home/cavsfan/.config/conkywx/vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf**,

I initially had issues or errors when I tried to use both the location and xml_id= but, up until now I don't think it had a problem.
But, the wxalert file no longer starts with **XML data Error - Using Main Data!!!**.

Nothing really changed in the display but, at least that error isn't there any more.
Also I do not get that "Conky: unknown variable" error in the terminal.

Oh my aching brain! :D

The moon doesn't really look like it's 3D although I do see a 3D full moon in the tmp directory along with the green colored forecast pictures.
What do you think?

[ATTACH=CONFIG]247096[/ATTACH]

### Post by paramvir on 2013-10-21
> **Cavsfan said:**
> 
Oh my aching brain! :D

The moon doesn't really look like it's 3D although I do see a 3D full moon in the tmp directory along with the green colored forecast pictures.
What do you think?


Well - I took some of that ache and have a look :D

[ATTACH=CONFIG]247111[/ATTACH] 


Do not quote the template7 as if_existing does not handle quotes
```

template7 /tmp/wx-param-vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf-pChA_r_27u0-m39/wxalert

```

I changed color3 yellow and color5 cyan and references made within the rc file and template were changed - you will need to change the color5 to color4 in music player section in the rc file.
```

##################################
##      CONKYWX WEATHER         ##
##################################
${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWX${if_existing ${template7}} \
${color5}Alert: ${if_match ${execi 60 expr length "$(cat ${template7})"}>=32}\
${color3}${scroll 30 10 ${execi 60 cat ${template7}}}${else}${color3}\
${execi 60 cat ${template7}}${endif}${endif} ${color6}${hr 2}${font}
####
## Uncomment for IMPERIAL Weather Stats (GRAPHIC icon set).
${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template1}" -t "${template4}"}${font}

```



Here is the wx-wu-vindsl-imperial-weather-graphic-template.sh

```

#################################################
## VinDSL | rev. 13-10-21 12:09 | ver. GRAPHIC ##
#################################################
## IMPERIAL WEATHER TEMPLATE for Conkywx 1.0.0 ##
#################################################
${voffset 0}${font RadioSpace:size=33}${color6}${alignc -5}[PT]${font}${font Arrows:size=28}${voffset -19}${offset 2}${color6}[FCTTF]${font}
${voffset 2}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.4}${alignc 6}${color4}Feels${offset 3}like${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[FL]${offset 2}${color4}/${offset 3}${color6}[FCTT]${font}
${voffset -40}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.75}${color6}[D1T]${font}
${voffset 0}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.3}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color6}[D1P]${font}
${voffset -45}${goto 188}${font KRARound:size=41.5}${color6}I${font}
${voffset 6}${font Ubuntu:size=22.75}${color4}${alignc}[CT]${font}
${voffset 7}${alignc 3}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color4}Sunrise${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[SR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTSRF]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 10}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color4}Sunset${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[SS]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTSSF]${font}
${voffset 8}${goto 83}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Humidity${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[HM]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTHF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Barometer${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[BR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTPF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Moonrise${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[MR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTMRF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Moonset${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[MS]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTMSF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 83}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Full${offset 3}Moon${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[FM]${font}
${if_existing [BI]}${voffset -30}${image [BI] -p 10, 615 -s 60x60}${else}${voffset -65}${goto 16}${font ConkyWindNESW:size=41.6}${color6}[BF]${font}${endif}
${voffset -38}${font DroidSans:bold:size=10.5}${color4}${alignc -95}[MV]${font}
${voffset 23}${goto 22}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color2}[WS] mph${voffset -1}${goto 203}[MP]${font}
${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}${goto 30}Temp${goto 120}Baro${goto 210}Dew
${voffset -1}${image [GT] -p 18,705 -s  50x10}${image [GP] -p 107,705 -s  50x10}${image [GD] -p 190, 705 -s  50x10}
${voffset 9}${goto 27}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.5}${color4}[D2D]${goto 86}[D3D]${goto 145}[D4D]${goto 201}[D5D]${font}
${image [PIC] -p 10,  500 -s 46x46}${image [MIC] -p 195, 620 -s 45x45}${image [D2I] -p 22,  735 -s 34x34}${image [D3I] -p 82,  735 -s 34x34}${image [D4I] -p 141, 735 -s 34x34}${image [D5I] -p 198, 735 -s 34x34}
${voffset 20}${goto 27}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.5}${color2}[D2T]${goto 87}[D3T]${goto 147}[D4T]${goto 203}[D5T]${font}
${voffset -1}${goto 24}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color2}[D2P]${goto 84}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color2}[D3P]${goto 144}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color2}[D4P]${goto 201}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color2}[D5P]${font}


```

That looks fantastic !!! :D 

See the text marked bold and blue - the images have -p x, y axis - you will need to change the y axis mostly.

```

[SIZE=2]#################################################
## VinDSL | rev. 13-10-21 12:09 | ver. GRAPHIC ##
#################################################
## IMPERIAL WEATHER TEMPLATE for Conkywx 1.0.0 ##
#################################################
${voffset 0}${font RadioSpace:size=33}${color6}${alignc  -5}[PT]${font}${font Arrows:size=28}${voffset -19}${offset  2}${color6}[FCTTF]${font}
${voffset 2}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.4}${alignc  6}${color4}Feels${offset 3}like${offset 1}:${offset  2}${color6}[FL]${offset 2}${color4}/${offset 3}${color6}[FCTT]${font}
${voffset -40}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.75}${color6}[D1T]${font}
${voffset 0}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.3}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color6}[D1P]${font}
${voffset -45}${goto 188}${font KRARound:size=41.5}${color6}I${font}
${voffset 6}${font Ubuntu:size=22.75}${color4}${alignc}[CT]${font}
${voffset 7}${alignc 3}${font  DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color4}Sunrise${offset 1}:${offset  1}${color6}[SR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font  Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTSRF]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 10}${font  DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color4}Sunset${offset 1}:${offset  1}${color6}[SS]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font  Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTSSF]${font}
${voffset 8}${goto 83}${font  DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Humidity${offset 1}:${offset  2}${color6}[HM]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font  Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTHF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font  DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Barometer${offset 1}:${offset  2}${color6}[BR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font  Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTPF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font  DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Moonrise${offset 1}:${offset  1}${color6}[MR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font  Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTMRF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font  DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Moonset${offset 1}:${offset  1}${color6}[MS]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font  Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTMSF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 83}${font  DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}Full${offset 3}Moon${offset  1}:${offset 2}${color6}[FM]${font}
${if_existing [BI]}${voffset -30}[COLOR=#0000ff]**${image [BI] -p 10, 615 -s  60x60}**[/COLOR]${else}${voffset -65}${goto 16}${font  ConkyWindNESW:size=41.6}${color6}[BF]${font}${endif}
${voffset -38}${font DroidSans:bold:size=10.5}${color4}${alignc -95}[MV]${font}
${voffset 23}${goto 22}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color2}[WS] mph${voffset -1}${goto 203}[MP]${font}
${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color4}${goto 30}Temp${goto 120}Baro${goto 210}Dew
[COLOR=#0000ff]**${voffset -1}${image [GT] -p 18,705 -s  50x10}${image [GP] -p 107,705 -s  50x10}${image [GD] -p 190, 705 -s  50x10}**[/COLOR]
${voffset 9}${goto 27}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.5}${color4}[D2D]${goto 86}[D3D]${goto 145}[D4D]${goto 201}[D5D]${font}
[COLOR=#0000ff]**${image [PIC] -p 10,  500 -s 46x46}${image [MIC] -p 195, 620 -s  45x45}${image [D2I] -p 22,  735 -s 34x34}${image [D3I] -p 82,  735 -s  34x34}${image [D4I] -p 141, 735 -s 34x34}${image [D5I] -p 198, 735 -s  34x34}**[/COLOR]
${voffset 20}${goto 27}${font  DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.5}${color2}[D2T]${goto 87}[D3T]${goto  147}[D4T]${goto 203}[D5T]${font}
${voffset -1}${goto 24}${font  DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color2}[D2P]${goto  84}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color2}[D3P]${goto 144}${color4}CoR${offset  3}${color2}[D4P]${goto 201}${color4}CoR${offset 3}${color2}[D5P]${font}

> Hi!

I just only want to have the weather + moon, callendar and time secton.
Can someone pleace, make a list step-by-step how to make it?

> **NM5TF said:**
> maybe a good place to start would be to read the thread all the way through...:o

you should be able to see how each section has evolved over the last 2
years....it is even broken down into very detailed descriptions of how to
generate each display....:D

asking someone to generate a step-by-step list for you on a public forum
without making any efforts of your own might be a little much....just sayin;)

I found the basics on page 75 of this thread. You can get most of the things you need there. Not sure if the fonts are still good to go but I posted a link with the fonts zipped somewhere in the last 5 or so pages.
NM5TF, asking someone to read 118 pages of a thread is a lot to ask too! :) Page 75 got me where I am today.
Good luck nelight2!

### Post by paramvir on 2013-10-21
> **Cavsfan said:**
> Here is what my Saucy weather looks like now. Pretty sweet! Thanks again NM5TF for the Audacious code! :D


That looks great :D - by the way since you are running 13.10 - in the vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf config file at the bottom you have the following code -the day condition is flat white - comment the blue section and remove the comments from the green section.

```

## if your images are looking rather bright or white then perhaps you can use the below commented values
[COLOR=#0000ff]
fti_now_3d_depth='5%'
fti_now_line_thickness='2'
fti_now_image_thickness='6'
fti_now_brightness='110%'

fti_fct_3d_depth='20%'
fti_fct_line_thickness='2'
fti_fct_image_thickness='6'
fti_fct_brightness='115%'

fti_wind_3d_depth='15%'
fti_wind_line_thickness='1'
fti_wind_image_thickness='2'
fti_wind_brightness='115%'[/COLOR]

## For Ubuntu 13+ and Mint Systems

[COLOR=#008000]## fti_now_3d_depth='8%'
## fti_now_line_thickness='3'
## fti_now_image_thickness='2'
## fti_now_brightness='70%'

## fti_fct_3d_depth='15%'
## fti_fct_line_thickness='3'
## fti_fct_image_thickness='2'
## fti_fct_brightness='100%'

## fti_wind_3d_depth='5%'
## fti_wind_line_thickness='1'
## fti_wind_image_thickness='1'
## fti_wind_brightness='110%'[/COLOR]

```

### Post by Cavsfan on 2013-10-22

Just a thought but this is conky man! Pointing someone to a page doesn't do a whole lot for them. There is a ginormous learning curve as you know. 
When I first looked it I thought that's nice but, I'll never figure any of that out. Slowly but surely I got to where I needed. Although I am no conky authority by any means.
There is still a lot I don't get about it. I am just happy VinDSL and paramvir have shared their work. :) They have been very generous with their work and their time.

This is the best forum! :D

Oh, one thing I might add **nelight2**, you have to install **lm-sensors** and run **sudo sensors-detect** from a terminal and answer yes to all the questions.
This will provide a lot of information to conky.

### Post by aquarius18 on 2013-10-29
Well, well, well...

Spoke too soon. Managed to increase the width of the ticker to cover the full width of the panel.

Changed the blue highlighted pieces from 30 to 45

Old:

```
##################################
##   CONKYWX WEATHER (Metric)   ##
##################################
${voffset 12}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}WEATHER${font}
### Uncomment to use Frank's template set
${execpi 300 conkywx -c ${template7} -t ${template6}}${font}
##
${voffset 35}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${if_existing ${template3}} \
${offset 8}${color tomato}Alerts : ${if_match ${execi 60 expr length "$(cat ${template3})"}>=32}\
${color cyan}${scroll **[COLOR=#0000cd]30 [/COLOR]**10 ${execi 60 cat ${template3}}}${else}\
${color5}${execi 60 cat ${template3}}${endif}${endif} ${font}
##
```

New:

```
##################################
##   CONKYWX WEATHER (Metric)   ##
##################################
${voffset 12}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${color4}WEATHER${font}
### Uncomment to use Frank's template set
${execpi 300 conkywx -c ${template7} -t ${template6}}${font}
##
${voffset 35}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8}${if_existing ${template3}} \
${offset 8}${color tomato}Alerts : ${if_match ${execi 60 expr length "$(cat ${template3})"}>=32}\
${color cyan}${scroll **[COLOR=#0000cd]45[/COLOR]** 10 ${execi 60 cat ${template3}}}${else}\
${color5}${execi 60 cat ${template3}}${endif}${endif} ${font}
##
```

Still leaves me to fix the smoothness of the scroller....

Hey Frank - your conky looking good :D
Surprise surprise I just hit Five Oh a couple of days back :guitar:

Yes it does feel fantabulous to get that freaky feeling of the childhood days isn't it ??? that excitement one has difficulty in articulating - and only the one who knows you so well can tell :lolflag:

And you still have to play with the other goodies - font to image - a word of warning - it gets addictive just like conky... and not to mention the 3 graphs lol

It does not become very smooth as the best you can do is reduce the stepping to 1 and then also reduce the update_interval to say 0.1 [ making it faster] - but it still gives a jerky scroll as it stops to print out each character. That is why I use a step of 10 and update every 3 seconds. I have seen some place a lua script for smooth scrolling - cant find it now while googling..

cheers :D

Thanks guys - @Cavsfan @Vindsl for the B day wishes lol - Five O is a landmark of sorts ...

On another note - wunderground figures your units based on your IP address - and in today's day n age - that is not good enough as quite often people in the metric world have started getting Imperial units. A forced update fixes it - my wild guess is that some how it figures the correct location but is getting to be more erratic.

Shall figure a way hmmmmmm...

### Post by 3GyXCEc on 2013-10-31
Hi everybody. 
My conkyforecast died afew days ago so I decided it was the right time to give conkywx a try. :)

I) At first, I followed the very well done foodoo instructions (#404 [http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1771033&page=41&p=12266079#post12266079](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1771033&page=41&p=12266079#post12266079))

It seems to work fine but I don't know why, sometimes it shows imperial units instead of the metric ones (mixed together):

[IMG]http://i44.tinypic.com/2z6uo9c.jpg[/IMG] [IMG]http://i41.tinypic.com/6opwe0.png[/IMG]

plus, the double windspeed (km/h + mph)is very annoying. Does anybody know how to fix it?



II) Then i tried to set up what it shouldbe the newer version, but it doesn't display anything.

**conkyrc**

```


####
## Define the locations of Conkywx files (required)
## Set the path to your .confs and templates here.
#
**template0 "/usr/share/conkywx/conkywx.sh"**
# template1 "/home/beerbaron/.config/conkywx/vindsl-imperial-conkywx.conf"
**template2 "/home/beerbaron/.config/conkywx/vindsl-metric-conkywx.conf"**
# template3 "/home/cavsfan/.config/conkywx/wx-wu-vindsl-imperial-weather-dingbat-template.sh"
# template4 "/home/beerbaron/.config/conkywx/wx-wu-vindsl-imperial-weather-graphic-template.sh"
# template5 "/home/cavsfan/.config/conkywx/wx-wu-vindsl-metric-weather-dingbat-template.sh"
**template6 "/home/beerbaron/.config/conkywx/wx-wu-vindsl-metric-weather-graphic-template.sh**"


TEXT
##################################
##      CONKYWX WEATHER         ##
##################################
${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWX${offset 8}${color6}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}
${voffset 4}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.25}${color4}CONKYWX${color0}${if_empty ${exec echo [WALERT]}}${else}${offset 8}Alert:${offset 8}${color4}[WALERT]${endif}${color6}${offset 8}${voffset -2}${hr 1}${font}  
####
## Uncomment for IMPERIAL Weather Stats (DINGBAT font set).
# ${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template1}" -t "${template3}"}${font}
####
## Uncomment for IMPERIAL Weather Stats (GRAPHIC icon set).
${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template1}" -t "${template4}"}${font}
####
## Uncomment for METRIC Weather Stats (DINGBAT font set).
# ${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template2}" -t "${template5}"}${font}
####
## Uncomment for Metric Weather Stats (GRAPHIC icon set).
**${execpi 900 ${template0} -c "${template2}" -t "${template6}"}${font}**

```


**vindsl-metric-conkywx.conf **(I copied the paramvir's config, replacing units)```


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Wund Weather Config File | Paramvir | rev. 13-10-19 05:10 | ver. 1.0.0
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## THIS PROGRAM IS FOR PERSONAL AND PRIVATE USE ONLY
## CONTACT WUNDERGROUND.COM FOR PROFESSIONAL SOLUTIONS
## CAVEAT: No guarantee that this program will work on all platforms,
## Use At Your Own Risk.


## To comment an option means adding # character at the start of that line
## this line is a comment starting with a # character


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Location settings - REQUIRED
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## # Scottsdale, Arizona, General Vicinity
## Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:85250.1.99999"
## # Indian Harbour Beach, FL
Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:32937.3.99999"
## # Chandler, Arizona, General Vicinity
## Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:85224.1.99999"
## # Fairbanks, Alaska, General Vicinity
## Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:99701.1.99999"
## # Colville, Washington, General Vicinity
## Location="http://www.wunderground.com/q/zmw:99114.1.99999"


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## xml_ID to use XML data from wunderground - OPTIONAL
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## # Scottsdale, AZ, Equestrian Manor
## xml_ID=KAZSCOTT39
## # Indian Harbour Beach, FL
## xml_id=KFLSATEL4
## # Chandler, AZ, Cooper and Frye
## xml_ID=KAZCHAND36
## # Fairbanks, AK, Skyflight Airstrip
## xml_ID=KAKFAIRB35
## # Colville, WA, Colville Mountain
## # Indian Harbour Beach, FL
xml_ID=KFLINDIA12


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## User position
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Enter Latitude, Longitude and t_zone (time zone) in decimal format
## Comment the position if you want to use wunderground data co-ordinates
## This position will be in 1 decimal place.
## To get more accurate information for your precise location the coordinates
## can be picked by using Google or http://www.findlatitudeandlongitude.com
## Latitude="37.456254° N"
## Longitude="88.867862° E"




## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## How to handle the time zone values
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Let conkywx calculate the time difference
## [2] Pick up the time zone values from wunderground
## OR - To Use custom time zone. State the time zone here
t_zone_pick=2


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Time Zone - set t_zone only if t_zone_pick=0
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Comment this variable if not required
## t_zone="7.5"




## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Units to use and Downloaded
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Enter the units to get and use, centigrade or Fahrenheit
## [SI] metric
## [IM] imperial/english
[COLOR=#00ff00]**Units_to_Use=SI**[/COLOR]
[COLOR=#00ff00]**Units_downloaded=SI**[/COLOR]




## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## comment option to disable, defining variable to 0 also works
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] enable
## if you want to see units like km/h etc in conky
## Units_show=1


## Sunday, 27 will become Sun 27
use_short_date=1


## Every update a popup notification shows
show_notification=1


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Weather Alerts
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Note: Active alerts at present time are only for the US.
## They will NOT warn you if a Tropical Storm is coming your way.
## Enable show_wx_Tropical_alerts for that.
show_wx_Active_alerts=1
show_wx_Tropical_alerts=1


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Allow Conkywx to check for latest version release
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [0] Never check for a new version of Conkywx
## [1] Check for a new version, every 24 hours
enable_new_version_check=1


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Moon font characters with or without outline ring
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## NOTE: Default was formerly "simple" e.g. no outline ring
## [0] Disable outline and use simple
## [1] Use outline and disable simple
moon_outline=1


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Dynamic Moon - using ImageMagick
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## View Moon image as it appears outside
## [1] use your local time, [2] use station local time for calculation
## Needs Imagemagick installed
Dynamic_Moon=2


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Font to Image - using ImageMagick
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## convert ConkyWeather font to 3D images - state the colour here.
## Use only for Image Templates
## COMMENT these options for using in font templates
## COMMENT these options for using regular weather images in image templates
## Needs Imagemagick installed
## to see List of Color Names visit http://www.imagemagick.org/script/color.php
## Colour can be stated in any of the following formats - enclosed in single quotes
## example for colour *lime* - 'lime' '#0f0' '#00ff00' 'rgb(0,255,0)' 'rgb(0,100%,0)'
fti_now='#fed577'
fti_wind='DarkSeaGreen1'
fti_fct='lime'


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Trend Graphs - using GnuPlot
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## We have ability to generate graphs for temperature, pressure and dewpoint
## You need gnuplot to be installed
## comment these colour options do disable
## colour can be in names or '#fed577' format if name gives white output
## This seed data is generated by wunderground and rest is recorded by conkywx
graph_temp='red'
graph_pressure='green'
graph_dewpoint='cyan'




## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  How do you want the present conditon to look like
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Capitalize The First Letter Of All Words, In The Present Condition [Default]
## [2] All UPPERCASE
## [3] all lowercase
## [4] Capitilize the first letter/first word only, in the present condition
pc_what_case=1




## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Add words you want to remove from Present Condition text in this list
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Comment this variable Block if not required
pcondition_blacklist=(
    Freezing
    pellet
    pellets
    Precipitation
    Small
    'and:+'
    'heavy:hvy'
    'light:lt'
    'Low Drifting'
    'Patches of'
    'Severe:svr'
    'Thunderstorms:t-storms'
    'Thunderstorm:t-storms'
    'Widespread:ws'
    'with:+'
)


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  Process the final template before showtime
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Comment this variable Block if not required
template_cleanup=(
    'AM:${offset -2}AM'
    'PM:${offset -2}PM'
    'N/A:${offset 2}N/A'
    '${goto 206}100%:${goto 201}100%'
    'Calm km/h:${offset 8}Calm'
    'Calm mph:${offset 8}Calm'
    'First Quarter:${offset -6}First Qtr'
    'Full${font}:${offset -11}Full Moon${font}'
    'New Moon:${offset -13}New Moon'
    'Last Quarter:${offset -5}Last Qtr'
    'Waning Crescent:${offset -3}Waning'
    'Waning Gibbous:${offset -3}Waning'
    'Waxing Crescent:${offset -3}Waxing'
    'Waxing Gibbous:${offset -3}Waxing'
)


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
##  LANGUAGE to see data in
##  Current Supported Languages:
#    it [Italian]    - Message & Language Translation by "Night Train"
#    es [Spanish]    - Language Translation by "Paramvir" needs proofing
#    pt [Portuguese]    - Language Translation by "Paramvir" needs proofing
#    de [German]        - Language Translation by "Paramvir" needs proofing
#    fr [French]        - Language Translation by "Paramvir" needs proofing
#    English is default and needs no setting
## Comment this variable if not required
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## language_to_use="it"


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Use UPPERCASE or lowercase AM PM or am pm for 12 hour time format
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] ALL UPPERCASE (EXAMPLE: 03:00 PM)
## [2] all lowercase (example: 03:00 pm)
## [3] Hide am pm (example: 03:00)
## [4] all lowercase with no padding/spacing (example: 3:00pm)
## [5] Use 24 hour time format
## OR - To Use custom time format. State the format here
## To get more date formats see man strftime
## Time_format='%-I:%M %p'
Time_format='%l:%M %p'


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Show time with month and day for Moon Phases
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Show month day time (example: May 18 10:06 am)
##      The time will follow the Time_format settings above in Time_format.
## [2] Show only month n day (EXAMPLE: May 18)
## OR - To Use custom time format. State the format here
## To get more date formats see man strftime
## moon_time='%d %b %R'
moon_time=1


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Today date format - used in last fetch
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
today_date_format='%A %b, %d %Y'


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## show deg symbol in forecast temps,
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Hide all deg symbols (example: 95/63)
## [2] Show all deg symbols (example: 95°/63°)
## [3] Show all deg symbols, depending on Unit_to_Use (metric: 35°C/17°C) (imperial: 95°F/63°F)
## [4] Show deg symbol ONLY, after forecast pair (example: 95/63°)
## [5] Show deg symbol AND unit, after forecast pair (example: 95/63°F) [Default]
show_degsym_fc_temp=4


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## characters to use for forecast trends
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Rising trend arrow
risingtrend='c'
##
## Falling trend arrow
fallingtrend='d'
##
## Steady trend arrow
steadytrend='Q'




## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Choose weather icon set
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## [1] Enable icon set: org 12 by bharathp666 (Paramvir Likhari remix)
## [2] Enable icon set: origin unknown
## [3] Enable icon set: tick weather icons by xiao4
## [4] Enable icon set: Sticker Weather Icons by Kortoik
wx_iconset=2


## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
## Minimum time the script allows the website to be polled
## -----------------------------------------------------------------------
minimum_fetch_time=870


## Uncomment for testing purposes. Fetches fresh data every time Conky is restarted.
## minimum_fetch_time=10
## minimum_fetch_time=3600


## Font to image internal settings - do not comment - change only if required
## These setting changes may be required for some Systems
## ONLY USED if you are using fti [ font to image] above - do not comment these
## you can change these values if rendered images are not to your liking
## 3d_depth = normalize level % - 0-max depth, 50-flat, 50 - 100 inverse 3D, only whole values no decimal
## line_thickness = strokewidth value can use decimal values
## image_thickness = blur sigma value can use decimal values
## brightness = tint % only whole values no decimal
## if your images are looking rather bright or white then perhaps you can use the below commented values


fti_now_3d_depth='5%'
fti_now_line_thickness='2'
fti_now_image_thickness='6'
fti_now_brightness='110%'


fti_fct_3d_depth='20%'
fti_fct_line_thickness='2'
fti_fct_image_thickness='6'
fti_fct_brightness='115%'


fti_wind_3d_depth='15%'
fti_wind_line_thickness='1'
fti_wind_image_thickness='2'
fti_wind_brightness='115%'


## For Ubuntu 13+ and Mint Systems


## fti_now_3d_depth='8%'
## fti_now_line_thickness='3'
## fti_now_image_thickness='2'
## fti_now_brightness='70%'


## fti_fct_3d_depth='15%'
## fti_fct_line_thickness='3'
## fti_fct_image_thickness='2'
## fti_fct_brightness='100%'


## fti_wind_3d_depth='5%'
## fti_wind_line_thickness='1'
## fti_wind_image_thickness='1'
## fti_wind_brightness='110%'

```
[B]

wx-wu-vindsl-metric-weather-graphic-template.sh[/B]
```


#################################################
## VinDSL | rev. 12-11-21 21:07 | ver. GRAPHIC ##
#################################################
##  METRIC WEATHER TEMPLATE for Conkywx 0.7.9  ##
#################################################
${voffset 0}${font RadioSpace:size=33}${color6}${alignc -5}[PT]${font}${font Arrows:size=28}${voffset -19}${offset 2}${color6}[FCTTF]${font}
${voffset 2}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.4}${alignc 6}${color5}Feels${offset 3}like${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[FL]${offset 2}${color5}/${offset 3}${color6}[FCTT]${font}
${voffset -40}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.75}${color6}[D1T]${font}
${voffset 0}${goto 203}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.3}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color6}[D1P]${font}
${voffset -45}${goto 188}${font KRARound:size=41.5}${color6}I${font}
${voffset 6}${font Ubuntu:size=22.75}${color5}${alignc}[CT]${font}
${voffset 7}${alignc 3}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color5}Sunrise${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[SR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTSRF]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 10}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8}${color5}Sunset${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[SS]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 3}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTSSF]${font}
${voffset 8}${goto 83}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Humidity${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[HM]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTHF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Barometer${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[BR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTPF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Moonrise${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[MR]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTMRF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 82}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Moonset${offset 1}:${offset 1}${color6}[MS]${font}${voffset -2}${offset 4}${font Arrows:size=14}${color6}[FCTMSF]${font}${voffset 11}${goto 83}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=7.55}${color5}Full${offset 3}Moon${offset 1}:${offset 2}${color6}[FM]${font}
${voffset -65}${goto 16}${font ConkyWindNESW:size=41.6}${color6}[BF]${font}
${voffset -33}${font DroidSans:bold:size=10.5}${color6}${alignc -92}[MV]${font}
${voffset 19}${goto 22}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color3}[WS] km/h${voffset -1}${goto 203}[MP]${font}
${voffset 9}${goto 27}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.5}${color5}[D2D]${goto 86}[D3D]${goto 145}[D4D]${goto 201}[D5D]${font}
${image [PIC] -p 15,507 -s 46x46}${image [D2I] -p 22,713 -s 34x34}${image [D3I] -p 82,713 -s 34x34}${image [D4I] -p 141,713 -s 34x34}${image [D5I] -p 198,713 -s 34x34}${image [MIC] -p 190,620 -s 45x45}
${voffset 33}${goto 27}${font DroidSansFallback:bold:size=8.5}${color3}[D2T]${goto 87}[D3T]${goto 147}[D4T]${goto 203}[D5T]${font}
${voffset -1}${goto 24}${font DroidSans:bold:size=8.45}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}[D2P]${goto 84}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}[D3P]${goto 144}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}[D4P]${goto 201}${color5}CoR${offset 3}${color3}[D5P]${font}

```
Any help will be appreciated.

### Post by NM5TF on 2013-10-31
for conkywx....

do you have imagemagick & gnuplot installed ??

in the conkywx.conf you have the font-to-image, Dynamic Moon,
and graph functions enabled....

Dynamic Moon & font-to-image functions both need imagemagick
to work....

the graph function needs gnuplot installed....

try commenting these out, then see if it works...or just install both
apps & you should be good to go...

the problem of Metric/Imperial displays has been noted & Paramvir
is looking into it...

Tommy
